The Experience

CuratedMoments

01/ 04
Luxury

Rooms & Suites

Coastal elegance meets contemporary design. Each suite opens to panoramic ocean views, curated with hand-selected furnishings and private sanctuaries of unparalleled comfort.

Discover More
Fine

Dining Experience

A culinary journey through coastal flavors. Our chef crafts exquisite menus featuring the freshest local seafood, international specialties, and hand-picked wine pairings.

Discover More
Infinity

Pool & Wellness

Float between sky and sea at our cliff-edge infinity pool. Surrender to wellness rituals inspired by ancient Goan healing traditions and modern spa therapies.

Discover More
Goa

Lifestyle & Culture

Immerse yourself in vibrant Goan culture — from golden beach sunsets and private yacht excursions to curated art walks and traditional music under the stars.

Discover More
Exclusive

Signature Amenities

Prime Location

Just 75 meters away from the beautiful Calangute Beach.

Air-Conditioned Rooms

Beat the Goa heat with our premium AC accommodations.

Swimming Pool

Take a refreshing dip in our pristine on-site pool.

Blue Rays Restaurant

In-house dining serving authentic Goan and multi-cuisine delicacies.

Family Friendly

A safe, budget-friendly, and welcoming atmosphere for all guests.

Discover More

Connect with our concierge

Contact Concierge

Prime Goa Location

Perfectly situated in the heart of North Goa, offering you the best of both worlds: serene comfort and vibrant local culture.

Calangute Beach

A mere 75 meters walk from your room to the golden sands of the 'Queen of Beaches'.

Easy Access

Near Octopus Restaurant, Maddo Waddo. Centrally located to all major attractions.

Culinary Delights

Surrounded by vibrant cafes, shacks, and our very own Blue Rays Restaurant.

Peaceful Enclave

Despite being close to the action, the hotel offers a budget-friendly and peaceful environment as loved by our guests.

"Rooms are good and reasonable."

Stay With Us

Rooms & Suites

Experience unparalleled comfort in our thoughtfully designed rooms. Whether you're a solo traveler, a couple on honeymoon, or a family, we offer the perfect sanctuary just steps away from Calangute Beach.

  • Air-Conditioned Comfort
  • High-Speed Wi-Fi
  • Daily Housekeeping
  • En-suite Bathrooms
  • Room Service Available

Blue Rays Restaurant

Indulge in a spectacular culinary journey. Our in-house restaurant offers a sophisticated blend of authentic Goan coastal flavors and exquisite international cuisine, prepared with the freshest local ingredients.

Frequently Asked Questions

We are located just 75 meters away from the pristine Calangute Beach, making it a less than 2-minute walk.

The Best Hotel in Goa for Your Coastal Escape

When looking for the best hotel in Goa, Bluerays Goa stands out as the ultimate luxury destination. Situated perfectly as a premium hotel near Calangute beach, our guests enjoy unparalleled access to the sun and sand. Whether you want to book a room in Goa for a romantic getaway or a family vacation, our luxury resort in Goa offers premium air-conditioned accommodations, a stunning swimming pool, and an exquisite in-house dining experience. Discover why so many travelers choose us when searching for a top-tier Goa hotel booking.
